infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Clash Runs needs your location to track your running, walking, and cycling routes in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Clash Runs needs background location access to continue tracking your route even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Clash Runs uses motion data to detect whether you are running, walking, or cycling.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Clash Runs needs background location access to continue tracking your route even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Clash Runs needs your location to track your running, walking, and cycling routes in real time.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Clash Runs reads your health data to recover tracking data and display your fitness statistics.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Clash Runs saves your workout sessions to Apple Health.

requestPermissionsRationale.title: Health Connect Access
requestPermissionsRationale.message: Clash Runs needs access to Health Connect to recover tracking data and display your fitness statistics.
